_about: DEEP GENERAL RELATIVITY corpus 2026-05-01. Beyond surface SR/GR — black holes, gravitational waves, cosmology applications, frontier topics like ER=EPR + holography. CK can already answer SR + basic GR; this deepens.
geometric_structure: Spacetime is operator-LORENTZIAN-MANIFOLD; signature (-,+,+,+); metric tensor g_{mu nu} encodes geometry.
Christoffel symbols are operator-CONNECTION-COEFFICIENTS; not tensors; encode covariant derivative.
Riemann tensor R^a_{bcd} is operator-CURVATURE-from-metric; commutator of covariant derivatives; symmetric under specific index swaps.
Ricci tensor R_{mu nu} is operator-TRACE-of-Riemann; appears in Einstein equations.
Ricci scalar R is operator-TRACE-of-Ricci; single number, also the Lagrangian density of Einstein-Hilbert action.
Einstein tensor G_{mu nu} = R_{mu nu} - (1/2) g_{mu nu} R + Lambda g_{mu nu}; operator-DIVERGENCE-FREE; couples to stress-energy.
Einstein equations: operator-G_{mu nu} = (8 pi G / c^4) T_{mu nu}; geometry = matter + energy distribution; 10 nonlinear PDEs.
Geodesic equation: operator-STRAIGHTEST-PATH on curved manifold; particles follow geodesics in absence of non-gravitational force.
Killing vector is operator-SYMMETRY-OF-METRIC; conserved quantities follow (energy + angular momentum + linear momentum).
black_holes: Black hole is operator-SPACETIME-REGION-from-which-light-cannot-escape; defined by event horizon.
Schwarzschild solution: operator-NON-ROTATING-NEUTRAL-BLACK-HOLE; metric g = -(1 - r_s/r) c^2 dt^2 + ... where r_s = 2GM/c^2.
Event horizon is operator-CAUSAL-BOUNDARY; once inside, future light cone points entirely toward singularity.
Singularity is operator-CURVATURE-INFINITY at r=0 in Schwarzschild; classical theory breaks down, requires quantum gravity.
Kerr solution: operator-ROTATING-BLACK-HOLE; spin parameter a; ergosphere where spacetime drags rotation.
Reissner-Nordstrom: operator-CHARGED-BLACK-HOLE; Q (charge) parameter; outer + inner horizons.
Kerr-Newman: operator-ROTATING-CHARGED; most general stationary axisymmetric black hole; (M, J, Q) characterize completely (no-hair theorem).
No-hair theorem: operator-STATIONARY-BLACK-HOLE-DETERMINED by (M, J, Q); other information hidden behind horizon.
Hawking radiation: operator-QUANTUM-FIELD-IN-CURVED-SPACETIME emits thermal radiation; T_H = hbar c^3 / (8 pi G M k_B); evaporation timescale ~10^67 years for solar mass.
Black hole entropy: operator-A/4 in Planck units; horizon area / 4 = entropy in natural units (Bekenstein-Hawking).
Information paradox: operator-WHAT-HAPPENS-TO-INFO that fell in + radiation appears thermal; one of deepest open problems.
gravitational_waves: Gravitational waves are operator-RIPPLES-IN-SPACETIME; transverse waves at speed of light; quadrupole radiation lowest order.
Linearized GR: operator-METRIC-PERTURBATION h_{mu nu} on flat background; wave equation for h.
Polarizations: operator-TWO-INDEPENDENT-MODES; plus (+) and cross (x); both transverse.
Strain h is operator-FRACTIONAL-LENGTH-CHANGE; ~10^-21 for distant binary mergers; need km-scale interferometers.
LIGO + Virgo + KAGRA are operator-LATTICE-OF-INTERFEROMETERS; first detection GW150914 (2015): ~30 solar mass binary BH merger ~1.3 Gly away.
Binary inspiral chirp: operator-FREQUENCY-INCREASES-AS-MERGER-APPROACHES; characteristic 'whoop' shape encodes masses.
Ringdown: operator-POST-MERGER-OSCILLATION at quasinormal modes; tests no-hair theorem.
Multi-messenger astronomy: operator-COINCIDENT-GW-AND-EM-DETECTION; GW170817 (binary neutron star merger) + GRB + kilonova confirmed gold/r-process origin.
LISA (~2035) is operator-SPACE-BASED-GW-DETECTOR; mHz band; supermassive BH mergers + extreme mass ratio inspirals + galactic binaries.
Pulsar timing arrays (PTA) are operator-NANO-Hz-DETECTORS; supermassive black hole binaries; NANOGrav announced evidence 2023.
Stochastic GW background: operator-LATTICE-OF-UNRESOLVED-SOURCES + cosmological signals (inflation, phase transitions, cosmic strings).
cosmology_applied_gr: FLRW metric: operator-HOMOGENEOUS-ISOTROPIC-EXPANDING-SPACETIME; ds^2 = -dt^2 + a(t)^2 [dr^2/(1-kr^2) + r^2 dOmega^2]; a(t) scale factor.
Friedmann equations: operator-EVOLUTION-OF-a(t); H^2 = (8 pi G/3) rho - kc^2/a^2 + Lambda c^2/3.
Hubble parameter H(t) = operator-da/dt / a; current H_0 ~ 67-73 km/s/Mpc (tension between local and CMB measurements).
Critical density rho_c = operator-3H^2 / 8piG; if total density = critical, geometry flat.
Density parameters Omega = operator-rho/rho_c by component; current Omega_m ~ 0.3 + Omega_Lambda ~ 0.7 + Omega_r tiny + Omega_k near zero.
Big Bang nucleosynthesis: operator-LIGHT-ELEMENT-FORMATION at ~minutes; H/He/Li abundances match Standard Model + Omega_b ~ 0.05.
Recombination at z~1100: operator-PHOTON-DECOUPLING; CMB released; current temp 2.725 K from then.
Dark matter: operator-NON-BARYONIC-NON-LUMINOUS-MASS; needed for galaxy rotation curves + cluster dynamics + structure formation; ~25% of energy density.
Dark energy: operator-NEGATIVE-PRESSURE driving accelerated expansion; ~70% of energy density; cosmological constant or quintessence (xi field is one candidate per Sprint 14).
Inflation: operator-EXPONENTIAL-EXPANSION at ~10^-36 s; explains horizon + flatness + monopole problems; predicts near-scale-invariant fluctuations confirmed in CMB.
Cosmic microwave background: operator-LATTICE-OF-PRIMORDIAL-FLUCTUATIONS; acoustic peaks encode cosmological parameters precisely (Planck satellite gold standard).
frontier_gr: ER=EPR: operator-BLACK-HOLE-INTERIOR-CONNECTED-VIA-WORMHOLE for entangled pairs (Maldacena + Susskind 2013); ties geometry to entanglement.
AdS/CFT: operator-BULK-AdS-EQUIVALENT-TO-BOUNDARY-CFT (Maldacena 1997); holography most precisely formulated; many implications.
Bekenstein bound: operator-MAX-ENTROPY-IN-REGION proportional to area not volume; holographic principle.
Black hole information paradox: operator-DEEP-OPEN-PROBLEM; resolved? 'Page curve' computations (2019-) suggest yes via island formula.
Entropic gravity (Verlinde) is operator-GRAVITY-AS-EMERGENT from entanglement; speculative but interesting.
Loop quantum gravity is operator-NON-PERTURBATIVE-QUANTIZATION-of-spacetime; spin networks + spin foams; competitor to string theory.
Causal dynamical triangulations operator-LATTICE-PATH-INTEGRAL of geometry; numerical approach.
Asymptotic safety: operator-GR-AS-NON-PERTURBATIVELY-RENORMALIZABLE at UV fixed point; Weinberg conjecture, evidence accumulating.
Modified gravity (MOND, f(R), TeVeS): operator-ALTERNATIVES-TO-DARK-MATTER; explain galaxy rotation differently; mostly disfavored by GW + CMB but specific variants alive.
Frontier: operator-INTEGRATION-OF-GR-AND-QM remains open; quantum effects matter near singularities + at Planck scale; many proposals, no consensus.
TIG xi field: operator-CANDIDATE-DARK-ENERGY in Sprint 14 framework (Brayden et al.); freezing quintessence; structurally compelling, observational tests in progress.
directive: GR is operator-LATTICE-of-spacetime-geometry; from binary mergers to cosmology to black holes to quantum gravity, the same framework applies.
CK should distinguish operator-PROVED (GR predictions confirmed by GW + Mercury perihelion + GPS + lensing + CMB) from operator-OPEN (information paradox + dark sector + quantum gravity).
Frontier topics deserve calibrated language; ER=EPR is intriguing not proven; AdS/CFT is well-established but only in negative-curvature spacetimes.
